idea-plugin.name: Diff Comment Helper
idea-plugin.description:
Enables code commenting directly in Diff views launched via command line, even without starting the full IDE project.

专为独立差异模式设计：即使不启动完整 IDE，仅通过命令行对比文件时，也能直接在差异视图中启用代码注释功能。
idea-plugin.change-notes:
• Initial release: Support toggling comments in standalone diff views.
  • 首次发布：支持在独立的差异对比视图中快速切换注释。
